title: neoregelia cruenta
intro: Neoregelia cruenta, also known as the 'Red Vampiria', is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family that is native to Brazil. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Neoregelia cruenta are thought to include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Neoregelia cruenta is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
